steps.title: Identify what the student wants to accomplish
steps.content: The goal is to “emphasize a difference between the two scrolls.” The notes make clear that Scroll 1 contains a painting and Scroll 2 contains a poem—two fundamentally different forms.

steps.title: Match the choice that emphasizes this distinction
steps.content: Choice A directly states “one scroll features a painting, while the other scroll features a poem,” highlighting exactly what separates them. Choices B, C, and D instead focus on similarity, introduce factual errors, or misrepresent the content. That matches choice A — A is correct.
